rationale: Educ. Code §19.0043 governs credit for Windham School District educational programs and high school diplomas. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or appraised value under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district shall grant credit to a student toward the academic, career and technology, or other course requirements for high school graduation for courses the student successfully completes in the Windham School District educational programs
_note: No conflict. Rule pertains to educational credit and diplomas; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amount.
